posts.author: RupeeRiser
posts.text: Amazon is opening its entire logistics network—freight, distribution, fulfillment, and parcel shipping capabilities—to every business, of all types and sizes — The Amazon Shipping was open to non-amazon retailers even long time back, maybe it wasn’t that popular until they decided to advertise this now. I remember that , I ordered something from Creative Sound Labs Website 2.5 years ago and they shipped it using Amazon Shipping. Even my regular Amazon delivery guy was surprised at that time to see a non-amazon order delivered through Amazon’s delivery network.

posts.text: Amazon is opening its entire logistics network—freight, distribution, fulfillment, and parcel shipping capabilities—to every business, of all types and sizes — Looks like they have started this service in India also image 1983×616 51 KB I have ordered some item (not from amazon), it is being shipped via Amazon Shipping Might make a tough competition to existing players in shipping in INDIA
